title: Michael Carriglitto

'''Michael Carriglitto''' wrote "[[Poison Moon (comic story)|Poison Moon]]" for [[Dark Horse Extra]] and edited [[Star Wars (1998) 27|''Star Wars'' (1998) 27]].
